title: I Release Contraction and Allow Joyful Flow
subtitle: An energy statement for shifting from spending-dread to ease with money in circulation
excerpt: A two-minute energy statement for when spending triggers a pull of dread or contraction. The release names the belief that money leaving is loss; the allow opens to money circulation as the natural, returning current of a working financial life.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow structure draws from The Money Zone: How To Release Hidden Resistance, Allow Flow And Manifest Millions (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for the Day 59 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when a payment, purchase, or dropping balance has triggered the familiar contraction and you want to shift the state before it shapes the next decision.

content.text: A two-minute energy statement for the spending-dread pattern. The contraction is a specific physical response — the tightening that comes with every outgoing payment. The release names that response and the belief behind it; the allow opens to money circulation as a joyful, returning motion.
I am ready to release all contraction, all dread, and all belief that money leaving is loss rather than circulation. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow joy in money's circulation, knowing that each payment is part of a current that always returns. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for the Day 59 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
